summary: Complete testing of SPCE ZIP Export and Email Signature Request features. All features working correctly: SPCE ZIP export returns valid ZIP with complete folder structure, dados.info JSON file, and all required files. Email signature endpoint properly validates inputs and generates signature links.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - non-blocking, visual works correctly after render

passed_tests: SPCE ZIP Export - returns valid ZIP file with status 200
SPCE ZIP Export - contains all 14 required folders (RECEITAS, DESPESAS, DEMONSTRATIVOS, etc.)
SPCE ZIP Export - contains valid dados.info JSON with required fields
SPCE ZIP Export - generates RECEITAS files from revenues
SPCE ZIP Export - generates DESPESAS files from expenses
SPCE ZIP Export - generates DEMONSTRATIVOS report files
SPCE ZIP Export - requires authentication (returns 401 without token)
Email Signature Request - returns 404 for non-existent contract
Email Signature Request - validates locador_email is required (returns 400 if missing)
Email Signature Request - generates signature_link on success
Frontend - SPCE ZIP export button visible on Reports page
Frontend - Downloaded file is valid ZIP format
seed_data_creation: Uses existing test campaign with CNPJ: 11222333000181
context_for_next_testing_agent: SPCE ZIP Export feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) ZIP contains 14 required SPCE folders, 2) dados.info is valid JSON with campaign metadata, 3) RECEITAS and DESPESAS files are auto-generated from database records, 4) Email signature endpoint works but actual email sending requires RESEND_API_KEY in .env (integration is graceful - returns success but notes email may not be sent without API key). Frontend 'Exportar Pacote ZIP Completo' button triggers download correctly.

features_verified.spce_zip_export_dados_info: ✅ Valid JSON with CNPJ, candidate name, categories, files list
features_verified.frontend_export_button: ✅ 'Exportar Pacote ZIP Completo' button visible and functional
features_verified.email_signature_endpoint: ✅ POST /api/email/send-signature-request endpoint working (RESEND_API_KEY required for actual email delivery)
